name: Abdul Sattar Edhi International Foundation
mission: PROVIDE SHELTER,CLOTHING,FOOD TO POOR AND THE NEEDY PEOPLE AROUND THE WORLD.
theoryOfChange: The website describes service delivery aimed at easing suffering through healthcare, education, and social welfare; examples include providing free treatment for those who cannot afford it, operating schools to break barriers to education, and welfare centers extending services to people at their door-steps.
zakatClaimEvidence: Abdul Sattar Edhi International Foundation Inc. is listed as "Zakat eligible". Their donation page explicitly offers a "Zakat" donation option. A PayPal donation page also states, "Use this donation for Zakat Sadaqah Donation". Furthermore, their website features a dedicated "Zakat" section and mentions "Edhi Foundation's Ramadan Zakat Appeal". (Source: https://edhina.org)

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Good donor alignment with manageable risk. Evidence quality is solid but still evolving in places.

keyConcerns.headline: Zakat-collecting organization holds 121 months of reserves
keyConcerns.detail: Zakat must be distributed promptly per Islamic jurisprudence. Large reserves raise concerns about timely distribution.

components.evidence: Accepts zakat (+2); Muslim-focused organization (+2); Asnaf: fuqara (+5); Operates in Muslim-majority regions (+3); Strong humanitarian service (+4)
components.name: Muslim Donor Fit

components.evidence: Niche cause: UNKNOWN (+4); Serves underserved populations (+3)
components.name: Underserved Space

alignment.rationale: Alignment 38/50: HIGH Muslim donor fit, religious cultural cause area

components.evidence: No beneficiary data available for cost-per-beneficiary scoring; high program ratio (≥85%) suggests efficient delivery
components.improvement_suggestion: Publish beneficiary counts consistently so cost-effectiveness can be assessed.
components.name: Cost Per Beneficiary

components.improvement_suggestion: Publish a time-bound plan to deploy excess unrestricted reserves into mission delivery, while keeping a clear operating reserve floor.
components.name: Financial Health

risks.risk_summary: Key concern: Zakat-collecting organization holds 121 months of reserves — zakat must be distributed promptly

risks.description: No outcome measurement or metrics tracking
Zakat-collecting organization holds 121 months of reserves — zakat must be distributed promptly

score_details.score_summary: Abdul Sattar Edhi International Foundation Inc shows strong alignment and good impact, with zakat compliance (minor risk deductions applied).

zakat.claim_evidence: Abdul Sattar Edhi International Foundation Inc. is listed as "Zakat eligible". Their donation page explicitly offers a "Zakat" donation option. A PayPal donation page also states, "Use this donation for Zakat Sadaqah Donation". Furthermore, their website features a dedicated "Zakat" section and mentions "Edhi Foundation's Ramadan Zakat Appeal". (Source: https://edhina.org)

all_citations.claim: The organization provides donation options and is recognized for Zakat eligibility.
The foundation reported total revenue of $5,752,945 and operates programs including ambulance and educational services.
The organization maintains a 95.1% program expense ratio, $0.00 fundraising efficiency, and 120.5 months of working capital.

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: The foundation earns a solid score due to its exceptional financial efficiency and long-standing reputation for direct service delivery. While its financial health is superior, the overall score reflects a need for more granular impact data.
areas_for_improvement: Limited third-party impact data available to verify specific cost-per-beneficiary outcomes.
Transparency could be enhanced by providing more detailed public reporting on specific program milestones.

dimension_explanations.alignment: This charity shows high alignment for Muslim donors as a Zakat-eligible organization rooted in a legacy of humanitarian service [1]. The mission addresses urgent religious and cultural priorities of poverty alleviation and care for the needy, supported by a strong track record of international relief efforts [2].
dimension_explanations.impact: The foundation demonstrates a direct service model with a total revenue of $5,752,945 dedicated to high-impact programs like emergency medical transport and basic needs [2]. Its financial health is a significant strength, characterized by a 95.1% program expense ratio and 120.5 months of working capital, though specific cost-per-beneficiary data is currently unavailable [3].

baseline_narrative.headline: The Abdul Sattar Edhi International Foundation Inc provides critical humanitarian relief and emergency services to vulnerable populations worldwide.
strengths: Exceptional program expense ratio of 95.1%, ensuring the vast majority of funds reach those in need.
Highly efficient fundraising operations with a cost of $0.00 per $1 raised.
Robust financial stability with 120.5 months of working capital available.
baseline_narrative.summary: The organization is dedicated to providing shelter, clothing, and food to impoverished individuals globally while maintaining a diverse range of social programs [2]. These initiatives include an extensive ambulance service, educational services, and the High Ways Project, which covers 25-kilometer stretches to ensure rapid emergency response [2][3].
